title: Faithful: PAEDirectionalBlur param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 26.6 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEDirectionalBlur must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEDirectionalBlur to range extremes across hosts ['Blurs__Directional', 'Stylized__Light_Sweep'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=26.62 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEDirectionalBlur implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEDirectionalBlur` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 9.242, "ddb": 26.616}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 5.248, "ddb": 33.731}, {"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 4.741, "ddb": 34.613}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "angle", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 3.619, "ddb": 36.96}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "angle", "theta": 6.2832, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 3.619, "ddb": 36.96}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "angle", "theta": 3.1416, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 3.619, "ddb": 36.96}]
